'''Storm Squadron''' was a [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForce]] unit of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was part of [[Eclipse Team]]. Around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] [[Tynan Ryln Mei]] took command of the unit.
